text: @mustafap0ly And when 1 second markets? Will need to invest in a new range of gaming mice.

Unfortunately, I’ve recently been diagnosed with a repetitive strain injury (RSI) affecting my wrist. The doctor has indicated this was caused by excessive clicking of a mouse. Does anyone know any good @Polymarket bots I can use to execute with instead? https://t.co/pGzOs7qOYE

While many institutional traders are hedging the upcoming CPI print with derivative contracts I contacted my local supermarket and have taken a large short position on a basket of groceries. #EfficientMarketHypothesis

What would happen if two accounts with infinite capital traded against each other on @Polymarket 15minute markets, both with a Martingale strategy? @federalreserve could you help with this experiment? https://t.co/t9R8BQ2gGC
Many pundits have said that a war between the US and Venezuela would lead to higher volatility. I have back-tested and rejected this hypothesis https://t.co/oLJBxe16Hu
In 2020 Oil Prices went negative. Is crypto realised volatility heading in the same direction? https://t.co/DXU4xYdlO1
